546	                    <div className="text-[14px] font-medium" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
547	                      {inspectorScoreFocus.kind === "measure"
548	                        ? `Bar ${inspectorScoreFocus.measureIndex + 1}`
549	                        : inspectorScoreFocus.partName}
550	                    </div>
551	                  </div>
552	                  {onEditFocusedRegion && tutorEnabled && (
553	                    <button
554	                      type="button"
555	                      onClick={onEditFocusedRegion}
556	                      className="shrink-0 rounded-[6px] px-[10px] py-[6px] font-mono text-[11px] font-medium"
557	                      style={{
558	                        backgroundColor: "var(--hf-accent)",
559	                        color: "var(--text-on-light)",
560	                      }}
561	                      aria-label={
562	                        inspectorScoreFocus.kind === "measure"
563	                          ? "Ask the assistant to suggest edits for this bar"
564	                          : "Ask the assistant to suggest edits for this part"
565	                      }
566	                    >
567	                      {inspectorScoreFocus.kind === "measure" ? "Edit this bar" : "Suggest edits"}
568	                    </button>
569	                  )}
570	                </div>
571	                <div
572	                  className="text-[11px] mt-[6px] leading-snug"
573	                  style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}
574	                >
575	                  Chat uses the facts below. Click a note for note-level engine context.
576	                </div>
577	                <pre
578	                  className="mt-[10px] m-0 max-h-[200px] overflow-y-auto whitespace-pre-wrap break-words font-mono text-[10px]"
579	                  style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
580	                >
581	                  {inspectorScoreFocus.evidenceLines.join("\n")}
582	                </pre>
583	              </div>
584	            )}
585	
586	          {noteInsight ? (
587	            <>
588	                <div
589	                  className="rounded-[6px] p-[12px]"
590	                  style={{
591	                    backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)",
592	                    border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
593	                  }}
594	                >
595	                  <div
596	                    className="font-mono text-[10px] mb-[6px]"
597	                    style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}
598	                  >
599	                    This note
600	                  </div>
601	                  <div className="text-[14px] font-medium" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
602	                    {noteInsight.noteLabel} ({noteInsight.voice})
603	                  </div>
604	                  <div
605	                    className="text-[11px] mt-[4px] leading-snug"
606	                    style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}
607	                    title={
608	                      noteInsight.insightKind === "melody-guide"
609	                        ? "Internal: melody-context"
610	                        : noteInsight.inspectorMode === "origin-justifier"
611	                          ? "Internal: origin-justifier — pitch still matches first generation"
612	                          : noteInsight.inspectorMode === "harmonic-guide"
613	                            ? "Internal: harmonic-guide — live score emphasis"
614	                            : undefined
615	                    }
616	                  >
617	                    {noteInsight.insightKind === "melody-guide"
618	                      ? `Input melody · chord moment ${noteInsight.slotIndex}`
619	                      : noteInsight.inspectorMode === "origin-justifier"
620	                        ? `Chord moment ${noteInsight.slotIndex} · still matches first generation`
621	                        : noteInsight.inspectorMode === "harmonic-guide"
622	                          ? `Chord moment ${noteInsight.slotIndex} · live score (edited or guide-only)`
623	                          : `Chord moment ${noteInsight.slotIndex}`}
624	                  </div>
625	                  {(noteInsight.originalEnginePitch != null || noteInsight.userModifiedPitch) && (
626	                    <div
627	                      className="text-[11px] mt-[8px] rounded-[4px] px-[8px] py-[6px]"
628	                      style={{
629	                        backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-accent) 12%, transparent)",
630	                        border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
631	                        color: "var(--hf-text-primary)",
632	                      }}
633	                    >
634	                      <div className="font-body text-[10px] font-medium mb-[4px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
635	                        First save vs what you see now
636	                      </div>
637	                      <div className="text-[10px] mb-[2px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
638	                        Pitch when the score was first loaded vs current pitch.
639	                      </div>
640	                      <div>
641	                        {noteInsight.originalEnginePitch != null ? (
642	                          <>
643	                            <span style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>At first load: </span>
644	                            <span className="font-medium">{noteInsight.originalEnginePitch}</span>
645	                          </>
646	                        ) : (
647	                          <span style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>No saved first pitch for this note.</span>
648	                        )}
649	                      </div>
650	                      <div className="mt-[4px]">
651	                        <span style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>In the score now: </span>
652	                        <span className="font-medium">{noteInsight.currentPitch}</span>
653	                        {noteInsight.userModifiedPitch ? (
654	                          <span style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}> (you changed it)</span>
655	                        ) : null}
656	                      </div>
657	                    </div>
658	                  )}
659	                </div>
660	
661	                {/* Progressive disclosure (Iter1 §3 / Iter2 §3): the three
662	                    rationale blocks (engine origin, what this click means,
663	                    verifiable export) default hidden to avoid "wall of text".
664	                    Users opt in via a disclosure toggle for the deeper story. */}
665	                <button
666	                  type="button"
667	                  onClick={() => setShowInspectorRationale(!showInspectorRationale)}
668	                  className="flex items-center gap-[6px] rounded-[4px] px-[8px] py-[4px] font-mono text-[10px] self-start"
669	                  style={{
670	                    color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)",
671	                    border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
672	                    backgroundColor: "transparent",
673	                  }}
674	                  aria-expanded={showInspectorRationale}
675	                >
676	                  {showInspectorRationale ? (
677	                    <ChevronDown className="w-[12px] h-[12px]" aria-hidden="true" />
678	                  ) : (
679	                    <ChevronRight className="w-[12px] h-[12px]" aria-hidden="true" />
680	                  )}
681	                  {showInspectorRationale ? "Hide rationale" : "Show rationale"}
682	                </button>
683	
684	                {showInspectorRationale && (
685	                  <>
686	                    {noteInsight.engineOriginExplanation ? (
687	                      <div
688	                        className="rounded-[6px] p-[12px] text-[13px] leading-[1.5]"
689	                        style={{
690	                          backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)",
691	                          border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
692	                          color: "var(--hf-text-primary)",
693	                        }}
694	                      >
695	                        <div className="font-body text-[13px] font-medium mb-[2px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
696	                          What the tool first wrote
697	                        </div>
698	                        <div className="font-body text-[10px] mb-[8px] leading-snug" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
699	                          Frozen snapshot from when the score was generated (if we have it).
700	                        </div>
701	                        <MarkdownText content={noteInsight.engineOriginExplanation} variant="panel" onKeywordClick={onKeywordClick} />
702	                      </div>
703	                    ) : null}
704	
705	                    <div
706	                      className="rounded-[6px] p-[12px] text-[13px] leading-[1.5]"
707	                      style={{
708	                        backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)",
709	                        border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
710	                        color: "var(--hf-text-primary)",
711	                      }}
712	                    >
713	                      <div className="font-body text-[13px] font-medium mb-[2px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
714	                        What this click means
715	                      </div>
716	                      <div className="font-body text-[10px] mb-[8px] leading-snug" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
717	                        {noteInsight.insightKind === "melody-guide"
718	                          ? "How your tune sits at this beat with the other staves. (HarmonyForge did not generate the melody—focus on fit and rhythm; full detail is in the export.)"
719	                          : "Why HarmonyForge’s axiomatic engine chose the original harmony pitch at generation, and how that relates to what you see now—then use the export to verify every staff."}
720	                      </div>
721	                      <MarkdownText content={noteInsight.currentPitchGuideExplanation} variant="panel" onKeywordClick={onKeywordClick} />
722	                    </div>
723	
724	                    <div
725	                      className="rounded-[6px] p-[10px] text-[11px] leading-[1.45]"
726	                      style={{
727	                        backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-accent) 8%, transparent)",
728	                        border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
729	                        color: "var(--hf-text-primary)",
730	                      }}
731	                    >
732	                      <div className="font-body text-[12px] font-medium mb-[2px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
733	                        Verifiable score export
734	                      </div>
735	                      <div className="font-body text-[10px] mb-[6px] leading-snug" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
736	                        Copied from your score so answers stay checkable—use this to confirm rhythm, meter, and what each staff is doing.
737	                      </div>
738	                      <pre
739	                        className="m-0 whitespace-pre-wrap break-words font-mono text-[11px]"
740	                        style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
741	                      >
742	                        {noteInsight.evidenceLines.join("\n")}
743	                      </pre>
744	                    </div>
745	                  </>
746	                )}
747	
748	                {/* Tutor summary (LLM) — after deterministic blocks; Ideas follow below */}
749	                <div
750	                  className="rounded-[6px] p-[12px] text-[13px] leading-[1.5]"
751	                  style={{
752	                    backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)",
753	                    border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
754	                    color: "var(--hf-text-primary)",
755	                  }}
756	                >
757	                  <div className="font-body text-[13px] font-medium mb-[2px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
758	                    Tutor summary
759	                  </div>
760	                  <div className="font-body text-[10px] mb-[8px] leading-snug" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
761	                    Short wrap-up after the facts—what you’re hearing, why it matters, and how it connects to the engine’s rules when useful.
762	                  </div>
763	                  <div>
764	                    {isStreaming ? (
765	                      <span
766	                        className="font-body text-[13px]"
767	                        style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
768	                      >
769	                        Generating summary…
770	                      </span>
771	                    ) : tutorEnabled ? (
772	                      noteInsight.aiExplanation?.trim() ? (
773	                        <MarkdownText content={noteInsight.aiExplanation.trim()} variant="panel" onKeywordClick={onKeywordClick} />
774	                      ) : (
775	                        <span
776	                          className="font-body text-[13px]"
777	                          style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
778	                        >
779	                          No summary yet. The panels above still describe the score—wait for the
780	                          reply or check your connection.
781	                        </span>
782	                      )
783	                    ) : (
784	                      <span
785	                        className="font-body text-[13px]"
786	                        style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
787	                      >
788	                        Add OPENAI_API_KEY (e.g. in .env.local or Vercel project env) for an AI summary.
789	                        Everything above still works without it—facts and export stay the same.
790	                      </span>
791	                    )}
792	                  </div>
793	                </div>
794	
795	                <div
796	                  className="rounded-[6px] p-[12px] text-[13px] leading-[1.5]"
797	                  style={{
798	                    backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)",
799	                    border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
800	                    color: "var(--hf-text-primary)",
801	                  }}
802	                >
803	                  <div className="font-body text-[13px] font-medium mb-[2px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
804	                    Ideas to try next
805	                  </div>
806	                  <div className="font-body text-[10px] mb-[8px] leading-snug" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
807	                    After the summary: practical next tries—each line should say what to change and why, grounded in the facts and export.
808	                  </div>
809	                  <div>
810	                    {!tutorEnabled ? (
811	                      <span
812	                        className="font-body text-[13px]"
813	                        style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
814	                      >
815	                        Set OPENAI_API_KEY to generate suggestion bullets here; deterministic panels
816	                        above still work without it.
817	                      </span>
818	                    ) : isStreaming ? (
819	                      <span
820	                        className="font-body text-[13px]"
821	                        style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
822	                      >
823	                        …
824	                      </span>
825	                    ) : noteInsight.aiSuggestions?.trim() ? (
826	                      <MarkdownText content={noteInsight.aiSuggestions.trim()} variant="panel" onKeywordClick={onKeywordClick} />
827	                    ) : (
828	                      <span
829	                        className="font-body text-[13px]"
830	                        style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
831	                      >
832	                        No suggestion bullets in this reply yet.
833	                      </span>
834	                    )}
835	                    {noteInsight.ideaActions &&
836	                      noteInsight.ideaActions.length > 0 &&
837	                      tutorEnabled &&
838	                      !isStreaming && (
839	                        <div
840	                          className="mt-[10px] flex flex-col gap-[6px]"
841	                          aria-label="Implementable idea actions"
842	                        >
843	                          <div
844	                            className="font-mono text-[9px]"
845	                            style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}
846	                          >
847	                            One-click pitch edits (from tutor JSON)
848	                          </div>
849	                          {noteInsight.ideaActions.map((a) => {
850	                            const status =
851	                              noteInsight.ideaActionStatuses?.[a.id] ?? "pending";
852	                            const resolved = status !== "pending";
853	                            return (
854	                              <div
855	                                key={a.id}
856	                                className="flex items-center gap-[8px] rounded-[4px] px-[8px] py-[6px]"
857	                                style={{
858	                                  backgroundColor: resolved
859	                                    ? "transparent"
860	                                    : "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-accent) 10%, transparent)",
861	                                  border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
862	                                  opacity: resolved ? 0.65 : 1,
863	                                }}
864	                              >
865	                                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
866	                                  <div
867	                                    className="font-body text-[12px] leading-snug"
868	                                    style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
869	                                  >
870	                                    {a.summary}
871	                                  </div>
872	                                  <div
873	                                    className="font-mono text-[10px] mt-[2px]"
874	                                    style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}
875	                                    title={a.noteId}
876	                                  >
877	                                    {a.suggestedPitch}
878	                                  </div>
879	                                </div>
880	                                {resolved ? (
881	                                  <span
882	                                    className="font-mono text-[9px] shrink-0 uppercase"
883	                                    style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}
884	                                  >
885	                                    {status}
886	                                  </span>
887	                                ) : (
888	                                  <div className="flex items-center gap-[4px] shrink-0">
889	                                    <button
890	                                      type="button"
891	                                      onClick={() => onAcceptIdeaAction?.(a)}
892	                                      className="flex items-center justify-center w-[26px] h-[26px] rounded transition-colors hover:bg-green-900/25 focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-1"
893	                                      style={{ color: "#2e7d32" }}
894	                                      aria-label={`Accept: set pitch to ${a.suggestedPitch}`}
895	                                    >
896	                                      <Check className="w-[14px] h-[14px]" strokeWidth={2.5} />
897	                                    </button>
898	                                    <button
899	                                      type="button"
900	                                      onClick={() => onRejectIdeaAction?.(a)}
901	                                      className="flex items-center justify-center w-[26px] h-[26px] rounded transition-colors hover:bg-red-900/25 focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-1"
902	                                      style={{ color: "var(--semantic-violation)" }}
903	                                      aria-label="Reject this idea"
904	                                    >
905	                                      <X className="w-[14px] h-[14px]" strokeWidth={2.5} />
906	                                    </button>
907	                                  </div>
908	                                )}
909	                              </div>
910	                            );
911	                          })}
912	                        </div>
913	                      )}
914	                  </div>
915	                </div>
916	              </>
917	          ) : null}
918	          {/* Chat separator */}
919	          {messages.length > 0 && (
920	            <div className="flex items-center gap-[8px] shrink-0">
921	              <div className="flex-1 h-[1px]" style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-detail)" }} />
922	              <span className="font-mono text-[9px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>Conversation</span>
923	              <div className="flex-1 h-[1px]" style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-detail)" }} />
924	            </div>
925	          )}
926	          {showStarterPrompts && (
927	            <div
928	              className="rounded-[6px] p-[10px]"
929	              style={{
930	                backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-accent) 6%, transparent)",
931	                border: "1px dashed var(--hf-detail)",
932	              }}
933	              aria-label="Suggested starts"
934	            >
935	              <div className="font-mono text-[10px] mb-[6px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
936	                Suggested starts
937	              </div>
938	              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-[6px]">
939	                {starterPrompts.map((p) => (
940	                  <button
941	                    key={p.id}
942	                    type="button"
943	                    onClick={() => onStarterPromptClick?.(p.prompt)}
944	                    className="rounded-[999px] px-[10px] py-[4px] font-mono text-[11px] hover:opacity-90"
945	                    style={{
946	                      backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)",
947	                      border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
948	                      color: "var(--hf-text-primary)",
949	                    }}
950	                    title={p.prompt}
951	                  >
952	                    {p.label}
953	                  </button>
954	                ))}
955	              </div>
956	            </div>
957	          )}
958	          <div role="log" aria-live="polite" aria-label="Theory Inspector — chat" className="flex flex-col gap-[8px]">
959	            {messages.map((msg) => renderChatMessage(msg))}
960	          </div>
961	          {isStreaming && streamingMessageId != null && (
962	            <div className="flex items-center gap-[4px] px-[12px] py-[6px]" aria-label="AI is typing" role="status">
963	              <span className="w-[6px] h-[6px] rounded-full animate-pulse" style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-accent)", animationDelay: "0ms" }} />
964	              <span className="w-[6px] h-[6px] rounded-full animate-pulse" style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-accent)", animationDelay: "150ms" }} />
965	              <span className="w-[6px] h-[6px] rounded-full animate-pulse" style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-accent)", animationDelay: "300ms" }} />
966	            </div>
967	          )}
968	        </div>
969	
970	        {/* AI first-visit modal */}
971	        {showAiModal && (
972	          <div
973	            className="absolute inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-[24px]"
974	            style={{ backgroundColor: "rgba(0,0,0,0.55)", backdropFilter: "blur(4px)" }}
975	            role="dialog"
976	            aria-modal="true"
977	            aria-label="About conversational AI in Theory Inspector"
978	            onClick={(e) => { if (e.target === e.currentTarget) dismissAiModal(); }}
979	          >
980	            <div
981	              className="w-full max-w-[320px] rounded-[12px] p-[20px] flex flex-col gap-[14px]"
982	              style={{
983	                backgroundColor: "var(--hf-panel-bg)",
984	                border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
985	                boxShadow: "0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)",
986	              }}
987	            >
988	              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-[8px]">
989	                <h2 className="font-mono text-[13px] font-semibold" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
990	                  Conversational AI is ready
991	                </h2>
992	                <button type="button" onClick={dismissAiModal} aria-label="Close" className="flex items-center justify-center w-[22px] h-[22px] rounded-full hover:bg-black/15" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
993	                  <X className="w-[12px] h-[12px]" strokeWidth={2} />
994	                </button>
995	              </div>
996	              <p className="font-body text-[12px] leading-[1.5]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
997	                This panel uses a language model for explanations, audits, and suggestions. HarmonyForge&#x27;s automatic voicings still come from the deterministic engine — transparent coaching next to fixed rules.
998	              </p>
999	              <p className="font-mono text-[10px]" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-secondary)" }}>
1000	                Click a note in the score, then ask anything.
1001	              </p>
1002	              <button
1003	                type="button"
1004	                onClick={dismissAiModal}
1005	                className="self-end rounded-[6px] px-[14px] py-[7px] font-mono text-[11px] font-medium transition-opacity hover:opacity-85"
1006	                style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-accent)", color: "#1a0f0c" }}
1007	              >
1008	                Got it
1009	              </button>
1010	            </div>
1011	          </div>
1012	        )}
1013	
1014	        <div
1015	          className="flex items-center gap-[8px] w-full h-[60px] px-[12px] shrink-0"
1016	          style={{
1017	            backgroundColor: "var(--hf-bg)",
1018	            borderTop: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
1019	          }}
1020	        >
1021	
1022	          <div
1023	            className="flex items-center flex-1 h-[36px] px-[12px] rounded-[4px]"
1024	            style={{
1025	              backgroundColor: "var(--hf-panel-bg)",
1026	              border: "1px solid var(--hf-detail)",
1027	            }}
1028	          >
1029	            <input
1030	              type="text"
1031	              value={inputValue}
1032	              onChange={(e) => onInputChange?.(e.target.value)}
1033	              onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
1034	              placeholder={
1035	                messages.length === 0
1036	                  ? "Ask anything about your score — try a Suggested start above"
1037	                  : "Ask a follow-up question"
1038	              }
1039	              disabled={chatInputLocked}
1040	              className="flex-1 bg-transparent border-none outline-none font-body text-[12px] font-normal disabled:opacity-50"
1041	              style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
1042	              aria-label="Theory Inspector message"
1043	            />
1044	          </div>
1045	          <button
1046	            type="button"
1047	            onClick={onSend}
1048	            disabled={chatInputLocked}
1049	            aria-label="Send message"
1050	            className="flex items-center justify-center w-[36px] h-[36px] rounded-[4px] shrink-0 transition-opacity hover:opacity-85 disabled:opacity-40 disabled:cursor-not-allowed focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-(--hf-accent)"
1051	            style={{ backgroundColor: "var(--hf-surface)" }}
1052	          >
1053	            <SendHorizontal
1054	              className="w-[14px] h-[14px] text-white"
1055	              strokeWidth={2}
1056	              aria-hidden="true"
1057	            />
1058	          </button>
1059	        </div>
1060	      </div>
1061	    );

1	"use client";
2	
3	import React from "react";
4	import ReactMarkdown from "react-markdown";
5	import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
6	
7	export type MarkdownTextVariant = "bubble" | "panel";
8	
9	export interface MarkdownTextProps {
10	  content: string;
11	  variant?: MarkdownTextVariant;
12	  className?: string;
13	  /**
14	   * When provided, bold (`**keyword**`) tokens become clickable.
15	   * The plain-text content of the bold node is passed to this callback.
16	   * Useful for clicking a pitch name (e.g. "G4") to highlight it in the score.
17	   */
18	  onKeywordClick?: (keyword: string) => void;
19	}
20	
21	/** Extracts the plain-text content from React children (handles nested nodes). */
22	function extractText(children: React.ReactNode): string {
23	  if (typeof children === "string") return children;
24	  if (typeof children === "number") return String(children);
25	  if (Array.isArray(children)) return children.map(extractText).join("");
26	  if (React.isValidElement(children)) {
27	    const el = children as React.ReactElement<{ children?: React.ReactNode }>;
28	    return extractText(el.props.children);
29	  }
30	  return "";
31	}
32	
33	/**
34	 * Safe markdown (no raw HTML): bold, italic, inline code, lists, paragraphs.
35	 * Root is a div so block-level markdown is valid inside chat cards.
36	 * When `onKeywordClick` is provided, bold runs become clickable keyword buttons.
37	 */
38	export function MarkdownText({
39	  content,
40	  variant = "bubble",
41	  className,
42	  onKeywordClick,
43	}: MarkdownTextProps) {
44	  const isBubble = variant === "bubble";
45	  const textSize = isBubble ? "text-[11px] leading-[1.6]" : "text-[13px] leading-[1.5]";
46	  const codeSize = isBubble ? "text-[10px]" : "text-[11px]";
47	
48	  return (
49	    <div
50	      className={cn("font-body font-normal", textSize, className)}
51	      style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
52	    >
53	      <ReactMarkdown
54	        components={{
55	          p: ({ children }) => (
56	            <p
57	              className="m-0 mb-2 last:mb-0"
58	              style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}
59	            >
60	              {children}
61	            </p>
62	          ),
63	          strong: ({ children }) => {
64	            if (onKeywordClick) {
65	              const keyword = extractText(children);
66	              return (
67	                <button
68	                  type="button"
69	                  onClick={() => onKeywordClick(keyword)}
70	                  className="font-semibold underline decoration-dotted underline-offset-2 cursor-pointer bg-transparent border-none p-0 inline"
71	                  style={{
72	                    color: "var(--hf-accent)",
73	                    textDecorationColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-accent) 55%, transparent)",
74	                  }}
75	                  title={`Click to highlight "${keyword}" in the score`}
76	                >
77	                  {children}
78	                </button>
79	              );
80	            }
81	            return (
82	              <strong className="font-semibold" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
83	                {children}
84	              </strong>
85	            );
86	          },
87	          em: ({ children }) => <em className="italic">{children}</em>,
88	          code: ({ children }) => (
89	            <code
90	              className={cn("font-mono px-[4px] py-[1px] rounded-[2px]", codeSize)}
91	              style={{
92	                backgroundColor: "color-mix(in srgb, var(--hf-surface) 14%, transparent)",
93	                color: "var(--hf-text-primary)",
94	              }}
95	            >
96	              {children}
97	            </code>
98	          ),
99	          ul: ({ children }) => (
100	            <ul className="list-disc pl-4 my-2 space-y-1 m-0" style={{ color: "var(--hf-text-primary)" }}>
101	              {children}
102	            </ul>
103	          ),
104	          ol: ({ children }) => (

106	              {children}
107	            </ol>
108	          ),
109	          li: ({ children }) => <li className="leading-[1.5]">{children}</li>,
110	        }}
111	      >
112	        {content}
113	      </ReactMarkdown>
114	    </div>
115	  );

_**User (2026-04-23 02:25:58Z)**_

# Vercel Project Status (Doctor)

Comprehensive project health check. Diagnoses deployment state, environment configuration, domains, and build status.

## Preflight

1. Check for `.vercel/project.json` in the current directory (or nearest parent).
   - **If found**: read `projectId` and `orgId` to confirm linkage. Print project name.
   - **If not found**: print a clear message:
     > This project is not linked to Vercel. Run `vercel link` to connect it, then re-run `/status`.
     Stop here — remaining steps require a linked project. **Do NOT fall back to GitHub Actions (`gh run list`) or any other CI system.** The Vercel CLI is the only authoritative source for this command.
2. Verify `vercel` CLI is available on PATH. If missing, suggest `npm i -g vercel`.
3. Detect monorepo markers (`turbo.json`, `pnpm-workspace.yaml`). If present, note which package scope is active.

## Plan

Gather project diagnostics using MCP reads where available, CLI as fallback:

1. Fetch recent deployments (last 5).
2. Inspect the latest deployment for build status and metadata.
3. List environment variables per environment (counts only — never print values).
4. Check domain configuration and status.
5. Read `vercel.json` for configuration highlights.

No destructive operations — this command is read-only.

## Commands

### 1. Recent Deployments

```
vercel ls
```

> **Note:** `vercel ls` does not support `--limit`. It returns recent deployments by default.

Extract: deployment URL, state (READY / ERROR / BUILDING), target (production / preview), created timestamp.

### 2. Latest Deployment Inspection

```
vercel inspect <latest-deployment-url>
```

Extract: build duration, function count, region, framework detected, Node.js version.

### 3. Environment Variable Counts

```
vercel env ls
```

Count variables per environment (Production, Preview, Development). **Never echo variable values.**

Present as:

| Environment | Count |
|-------------|-------|
| Production  | N     |
| Preview     | N     |
| Development | N     |

### 4. Domain Status

```
vercel domains ls
```

For each domain: name, DNS configured (yes/no), SSL valid (yes/no).

### 5. Configuration Highlights

Read `vercel.json` (if present) and summarize:

- Framework preset
- Build command overrides
- Function configuration (runtime, memory, duration)
- Rewrites / redirects count
- Cron jobs defined
- Headers or middleware config

If `vercel.json` does not exist, note "No vercel.json found — using framework defaults."

### 6. Observability Diagnostics

Check the project's observability posture — drains, error monitoring, analytics instrumentation, and drain security.

#### 6a. Drains Configured?

Use MCP `list_drains` if available, or the REST API:

```bash
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $VERCEL_TOKEN" \
  "https://api.vercel.com/v1/drains?teamId=$TEAM_ID" | jq '.drains | length'
```

- **If drains exist**: list drain count, types (JSON/NDJSON/Syslog), and statuses.
- **If zero drains**: note "No drains configured" and flag as a gap for production observability.

#### 6b. Errored Drains?

For each drain returned, check the status field. If any drain shows an error or disabled state:

```
⚠️ Drain "<drain-url>" is in error state.
Remediation:
  1. Verify the endpoint URL is reachable and returns 2xx.
  2. Check that the endpoint accepts the configured format (JSON/NDJSON/Syslog).
  3. Test the drain: POST /v1/drains/<drain-id>/test
  4. If unrecoverable, delete and recreate the drain.
```

#### 6c. Analytics Instrumentation Present?

Scan the project source for `@vercel/analytics` and `@vercel/speed-insights` imports:

- Check `package.json` dependencies for `@vercel/analytics` and `@vercel/speed-insights`.
- If missing either package, flag:
  > Analytics/Speed Insights not detected. Install `@vercel/analytics` and `@vercel/speed-insights` and add the components to your root layout.

#### 6d. Drain Signature Verification

Vercel signs every drain payload with an HMAC-SHA1 signature in the `x-vercel-signature` header. **Always verify signatures in production** to prevent spoofed data.

> **Critical:** You must verify against the **raw request body** (not a parsed/re-serialized version). JSON parsing and re-stringifying can change key order or whitespace, breaking the signature match.

```ts
import { createHmac, timingSafeEqual } from 'crypto'

function verifyDrainSignature(rawBody: string, signature: string, secret: string): boolean {
  const expected = createHmac('sha1', secret).update(rawBody).digest('hex')
  // Use timing-safe comparison to prevent timing attacks
  if (expected.length !== signature.length) return false
  return timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(expected), Buffer.from(signature))
}
```

Usage in a drain endpoint:

```ts
// app/api/drain/route.ts
export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const rawBody = await req.text()
  const signature = req.headers.get('x-vercel-signature')
  const secret = process.env.DRAIN_SECRET!

  if (!signature || !verifyDrainSignature(rawBody, signature, secret)) {
    return new Response('Unauthorized', { status: 401 })
  }

  const events = JSON.parse(rawBody)
  // Process verified events...
  return new Response('OK', { status: 200 })
}
```

> **Secret management:** The drain signing secret is shown once when you create the drain. Store it in an environment variable (e.g., `DRAIN_SECRET`). If lost, delete and recreate the drain.

Check whether the project has a `DRAIN_SECRET` env var set via `vercel env ls`. If drains are configured but no signature secret is found, flag as a security gap.

#### 6e. Fallback Guidance (No Drains)

If drains are unavailable (Hobby plan or not yet configured), use these alternatives:

| Need | Alternative | How |
|------|-------------|-----|
| View runtime logs | **Vercel Dashboard** | `https://vercel.com/{team}/{project}/deployments` → select deployment → Logs tab |
| Stream logs from terminal | **Vercel CLI** | `vercel logs <deployment-url> --follow` |
| Query logs programmatically | **MCP / REST API** | `get_runtime_logs` tool or `/v3/deployments/:id/events` |
| Monitor errors post-deploy | **CLI** | `vercel logs <url> --level error --since 1h` |
| Web Analytics data | **Dashboard only** | `https://vercel.com/{team}/{project}/analytics` |
| Performance metrics | **Dashboard only** | `https://vercel.com/{team}/{project}/speed-insights` |

> **Upgrade path:** When ready for centralized observability, upgrade to Pro and configure drains at `https://vercel.com/dashboard/{team}/~/settings/log-drains` or via REST API. The drain setup is typically < 5 minutes.

#### Observability Decision Matrix

| Need | Use | Why |
|------|-----|-----|
| Page views, traffic sources | Web Analytics | First-party, privacy-friendly |
| Business event tracking | Web Analytics custom events | Track conversions, feature usage |
| Core Web Vitals monitoring | Speed Insights | Real user data per route |
| Function debugging | Runtime Logs (CLI `vercel logs` / Dashboard (`https://vercel.com/{team}/{project}/logs`) / REST) | Real-time, per-invocation logs |
| Export logs to external platform | Drains (JSON/NDJSON/Syslog) | Centralize observability (Pro+) |
| Export analytics data | Drains (Web Analytics type) | Warehouse pageviews + custom events (Pro+) |
| OpenTelemetry traces | Drains (OTel-compatible endpoint) | Standards-based distributed tracing (Pro+) |
| Post-response telemetry | `waitUntil` + custom reporting | Non-blocking metrics |
| Server-side event tracking | `@vercel/analytics/server` | Track API-triggered events |
| Hobby plan log access | CLI `vercel logs` + Dashboard (`https://vercel.com/{team}/{project}/logs`) | No drains needed |

## Verification

Confirm each data source returned successfully:

- [ ] Deployment list retrieved (count > 0 or "no deployments yet")
- [ ] Latest deployment inspected (or skipped if no deployments)
- [ ] Environment variable counts retrieved per environment
- [ ] Domain list retrieved (or "no custom domains")
- [ ] vercel.json parsed (or "not present")
- [ ] Drain status checked (count, errored drains identified)
- [ ] Analytics/Speed Insights instrumentation detected (or gap flagged)
- [ ] Drain signature secret checked (if drains configured)

If any check fails, report the specific error and continue with remaining checks.

## Summary

Present the diagnostic report:

```
## Vercel Doctor — Project Status

**Project**: <name> (<org>)
**Latest Deployment**: <url> — <state> (<target>, <timestamp>)
**Build**: <duration>, <framework>, Node <version>

### Deployments (last 5)
| URL | State | Target | Created |
|-----|-------|--------|---------|
| ... | ...   | ...    | ...     |

### Environment Variables
| Environment | Count |
|-------------|-------|
| Production  | N     |
| Preview     | N     |
| Development | N     |

### Domains
| Domain | DNS | SSL |
|--------|-----|-----|
| ...    | ... | ... |

### Config Highlights
- <key settings from vercel.json>

### Observability
| Check | Status |
|-------|--------|
| Drains configured | N configured (N healthy, N errored) |
| Analytics (`@vercel/analytics`) | ✓ installed / ✗ not found |
| Speed Insights (`@vercel/speed-insights`) | ✓ installed / ✗ not found |
| Drain signature secret | ✓ DRAIN_SECRET set / ⚠ missing |
```

## Next Steps

Based on the diagnostic results, suggest relevant actions:

- **Build errors** → "Run `/deploy` to trigger a fresh build, or check `vercel logs <url>` for details."
- **Missing env vars** → "Run `/env list` to review, or `/env pull` to sync locally."
- **DNS not configured** → "Update your domain DNS records. See the Vercel domains dashboard."
- **No deployments** → "Run `/deploy` to create your first deployment."
- **Stale deployment** → "Your latest deployment is over 7 days old. Consider redeploying."
- **No vercel.json** → "Add a `vercel.json` if you need custom build, function, or routing configuration."
- **No drains (Hobby)** → "View logs via Dashboard or `vercel logs <url> --follow`. Upgrade to Pro for drain-based forwarding."
- **No drains (Pro+)** → "Configure drains for centralized observability via Dashboard or REST API."
- **Errored drain** → "Test the endpoint: `POST /v1/drains/<id>/test`. Check URL reachability and format compatibility."
- **Missing analytics** → "Install `@vercel/analytics` and add `<Analytics />` to your root layout."
- **Missing speed insights** → "Install `@vercel/speed-insights` and add `<SpeedInsights />` to your root layout."
- **Missing drain secret** → "Set `DRAIN_SECRET` env var. Without it, drain endpoints can't verify payload authenticity."
